docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY JONES, SCHILLER & COMPANY, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH, STEPHEN AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC KESSLER, MATTHEW AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH, STEPHEN AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JONES, SCHILLER & COMPANY, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUGH, STEPHEN AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC KESSLER, MATTHEW AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC. $2,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,770.00, MATTHEW KESSLER, AVALON BAY PROPERTIES, LLC IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SSERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH, STEPHEN AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC KESSLER, MATTHEW AVALON BAY PROPERTIES LLC.
